raw_response:
I concur with the consensus that option D - "Incomplete gas elimination" - represents the principal cause leading to glossy smooth margins in castings. One additional point supporting this view includes the fact that timely application of vacuum de-gassing techniques enables better removal of entrained gases, thereby preventing any potential disruption in maintaining a flawless finish throughout the entire casting piece without compromising structural integrity. Therefore,

**Answer Choice:** D **(Reaffirmed)**.
